app.title: Fence Cost Calculator
app.subtitle: Estimate the cost of your fence project

start.heading: Welcome
start.description: This tool helps you estimate the cost of your fencing project. Enter your fence dimensions and get an instant quote.

length.heading: Fence Length
length.description: How long is the fence you need?
length.label: Fence Length

height.heading: Fence Height
height.description: Select the height for your fence.
height.label: Fence Height

cost.heading: Cost Estimate
cost.description: Here is your estimated fence cost breakdown.
cost.disclaimer: This is an estimate only. Actual costs may vary based on materials, labor, and site conditions.

quotes.title: My Saved Quotes
quotes.empty: No saved quotes yet. Create a cost estimate and save it!
quotes.willOverwrite: A quote with this name already exists and will be overwritten.
quotes.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this quote?

cookie.message: This site uses cookies and local storage to save your preferences and project data.
